title: podman pod rm: Error: removing pod XXX cgroup: <echo>: Unit machine-ETC.slice not loaded
body:
Only one instance, in [int f38 root](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5615184333504512/html/int-podman-fedora-38-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--Podman-play-kube-with-build-Check-that-command-is-expanded--1), but am filing because there's just something about it that I don't like:
```
Podman play kube with build

   ....
   Enter AfterEach (i.e. cleanup/teardown)

   FAILED, exit status 125
```
